ingredients.entityContext: Gojo enters the curtain zone through Shibuya Hikarie's B3F concourse at the start of the Shibuya Incident, descending toward the Fukutoshin Line platforms below where Hanami, Jogo, and Choso are waiting. This is the beginning of Gojo's iconic solo battle sequence.

ingredients.entityContext: Taro Okamoto's 'Myth of Tomorrow' mural in Shibuya Station's connecting corridor appears as a backdrop during the Shibuya Incident arc, its apocalyptic imagery echoing the chaos unfolding around it. It is one of the most striking visual parallels in the series.

ingredients.entityContext: The Churaumi Aquarium is where Gojo and Geto take Riko Amanai during the Hidden Inventory arc, letting her experience wonder before her fate is decided. It is one of the arc’s most emotionally resonant moments.

ingredients.name: Naha International Airport
ingredients.entityContext: Naha Airport is where first-year students Nanami and Haibara are stationed during the Hidden Inventory arc to guard against a cursed spirit attack, the scene that foreshadows Haibara’s tragic fate.

ingredients.name: Boat Race Tamagawa

ingredients.entityContext: Boat Race Tamagawa is the setting for the anime-original scene depicting Toji Fushiguro gambling on a race in Episode 2 of Season 2, establishing his mercenary, detached lifestyle before he takes the Riko Amanai contract.
